name: Ebon Sun
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>漆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>太</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>陽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a face-up monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can gain LP equal to their combined original ATK. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned face-up from your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; it gains 1000 ATK. If a Spell/Trap(s) is discarded from your hand to your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Ebon Sun" once per turn.
eff: If a face-up monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can gain LP equal to their combined original ATK. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned face-up from your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; it gains 1000 ATK. If a Spell/Trap(s) is discarded from your hand to your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Ebon Sun" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
